overview: A full luxury 3D animated portfolio website for Makeover By Khushi Kumawat — the best bridal makeup artist and hairstylist in Kishangarh, Rajasthan. Features a premium beige & brown theme with advanced 3D animations throughout, celebrity work highlights, services showcase, Indian reviews, FAQ, and contact/maps.
features: 3D animated hero section with floating objects and portrait photo
Full services section (bridal, party, SFX, hairstyling)
Photo gallery with all 11 provided images
Why Choose Us with animated counters
Beige and brown light luxury theme with blurry glow effects
